entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region characterized by nutrient-poor soils and high pressure on land resources

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT POVERTY
entities.description: Characterized by low nutrients, low clay, low organic carbon content, and low exchange capacity

entities.name: LAND RESOURCES
entities.description: Natural assets including cultivated soils and rangelands that provide services to the community

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: Rapid increase in population causing pressure on land resources

entities.name: FOOD DEMAND
entities.description: Increased requirement for food production putting pressure on land resources

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of soils to sustain plant growth, which needs maintenance in cultivated areas

entities.name: EXTERNAL INPUT
entities.description: A paradigm from the 1960s and 1970s for managing soil fertility

entities.name: INTEGRATED SOIL FERTILITY MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to managing soil fertility

entities.name: LOCAL COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Groups of people at the heart of land resource management

entities.name: RANGELANDS
entities.description: Land areas used for grazing livestock

entities.name: PARTICIPATIVE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A dynamic process of managing lands involving local communities
